titleStmt.title: SII 28.25: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 25. (A.R. No. 25 of 1913.) ĀḌUTUṞAI, PERAMBALUR TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: Aparādhakshamēśvara Temple-Central Shrine, south wall of the maṇḍapa in front of

p.hi: Vīra-Bukkarāya, son of Vīra-Ariyarāya Śaka 1327, PArtthiva, Kaṉṉi, ba. Wednesday, UttiraṭṭAdi 1405 A.D., September 9.
p.note: Cf. A.R.Ep., 1914, 62, On the said date, it was ba. 1. 85 (L.D.S. Pillai, Indian Ephemeris. Vol. V).

summary.p: Records an order by the tantarikar and nāṭṭār of Ugaḷūr-ppaṟṟu, Kuṉṟappaṟṟu, Ten-paṟṟu, and Paḻuvūr-paṟṟu assigning the levies, nāṭṭu-viniyōgammaṭṭiṟai-. . āḍaviri and such viniyōgam due to them from the lands in the tirunāmattukkāṇi (lands in the name of the God) of God Tirukkuraṅgāḍutuṟai-uḍaiyār kuṟṟam-poṟuttaruḷiya-nāyanār in Ugaḷūr-kūṟṟam in Vaḍakarai Irāśiṅga-vaḷanāḍu, and from such lands that were cultivated in this ūr, for the worship in and maintenance of the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . mahāmaṇḍaleśvaran
Arirāyavipāṭaṉ pāṣai
kkut tappuvarāyarkaṇ
ṭaṉ muvarāyārakaṇṭaṉ śrī
vīra Ariyarāyaṉ kumāra śrīvīra
pukkarāyaṉukkuc cellā ni
ṉṟa cakāttam 1000 3 100 2 10 7 ṉme
pāttipa varuṣam kaṉṉi nāyaṟṟu
Aparapakṣattu putaṉkiḻamaiyu
m peṟṟa Uttiraṭṭāti nāḷ vaṭa
karai Irāciṅka vaḷanāṭṭu viṭ
ṭa paṟṟu Ukaḷūr kūṟṟattu tirukku
raṅkāṭutuṟaiyuṭaiyār kuṟṟam
poruttaruḷiya nāyaṉārkku Iṉṉā
paḻuvūrppaṟṟu teṉpaṟṟu kuṉṟappa
ṟṟu Ukaḷūrppaṟṟu nāṭṭārum tantatari
rum Iṉṉāyaṉāṟku pūcai tiruppaṇik
ku tirunāmattukkāṇiyil Uḻuṅkuṭikkum tiru
tuṟai tirumaṭai viḷākattil tānattār
[�r]kkum palapaṭṭaṭaikkuṭikkum
ivvūr palapayir ceyta nilattukkum kā
kkai nāṭṭu viṉivoka maṭṭiṟai
ṭāvirimaṟṟu nāṭṭai nokki va
viṉivokaṅkaḷum vaṉṉiyavari Āḷamañ
ciyum Iṉṉāḷ mutalukku Iṉṉāyaṉāṟku pūcai
tiruppaṇikku sarvvamānyamāka nāṭākak kuṭut
ta Aḷavukku Immariyāti cantrātittava
rai yum cellakkaṭavatu Ākak kallilu
kuṭuttom kuṟṟam poṟutta
viṭṭa paṟṟu paḻuvūr paṟṟu
paṟṟu Ukaḷūṟ paṟṟu nāṭṭār tantari māro
m Inta taṉmattukku Akitam paṇṇiṉavarkaḷ ke
ṅkaik karaiyil p pacuvaik koṉṟavaṉ pukunta narakattil pukutak kaṭavarkaḷākavum Ippaṭikku Ivai
paḻuvūṟ paṟṟu teṉpaṟṟu kuṉṟapaṟṟu nāṭṭavar paṇiyāl nāṭṭuk kaṇakku ṉvarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai Ukaḷūr paṟṟu nāṭṭavar paṇiyāl nāṭṭuk kaṇakku Irāñciṅka veḷāṉ Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 28.25 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
